name: ATR Breakout Trend-Follow XAUUSD M5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, a close that exceeds prior close by more than 1.0*ATR(14) while aligned with EMA(50)>EMA(200) signals a sustained impulse yielding positive expectancy at 2R TP.

entry_rules.long: close > close[1] + 1.0 * atr14[1] AND ema50 > ema200
entry_rules.short: close < close[1] - 1.0 * atr14[1] AND ema50 < ema200
entry_rules.notes: Pure momentum impulse with trend alignment and ADX regime filter; no session gate.
